sensor.description: ZWO ASI290MM monochrome under shared plexiglass dome; no daylight mode

fisheye.comment: PLACEHOLDER VALUES — calibrate from a sample FITS frame before first run.

overlay_mask_rects_px.comment: FITS frames typically have no burned-in overlay; the derived JPG might. Leave empty unless the derived-JPG variant is used.

orientation.comment: v2.0 cloud-motion feature uses this. PLACEHOLDER — calibrate with a known star on the horizon.

stf.comment: Midtones-transfer-function stretch parameters for FITS rendering in v1.1+. Reuse the AstroTriage-blinkV2 auto-STF kernel.

calibration.notes: Placeholder profile. Replace all *px* values with measured coordinates from a real FITS frame. Mono camera auto-excludes any frame where sun_alt_deg > day_exclusion_sun_alt_deg.
